mnemonics.title: De Morgan's Laws
mnemonics.content: Break the line, change the sign: Complement of union is intersection of complements, and complement of intersection is union of complements.

mnemonics.title: Set Operations Order
mnemonics.content: Please Excuse My Dear Aunt Sally - Parentheses, Exponents, Multiplication, Division, Addition, Subtraction (but for sets: Complement, Intersection, Union)

mnemonics.title: Empty Set Notation
mnemonics.content: Zero with a slash (∅) or empty braces {} - both mean 'no elements'

mnemonics.title: Subset Symbols
mnemonics.content: ⊆ looks like = under <, meaning 'subset or equal'. ⊂ looks like <, meaning 'proper subset'.

mnemonics.title: Cardinality of Power Set
mnemonics.content: Power of 2: For n elements, power set has 2ⁿ subsets.
